round1.text: What does {name} reach for first when they're stressed?

options: A complex, 5-step customized order with alternative milk
A black coffee or double espresso—liquid fuel only
The most sugary, seasonal special on the menu
They don't know; they just asked the barista for a recommendation

round1.text: How does {name} typically behave at a party where they only know the host?
options: The 'Social Butterfly' working the room within ten minutes
The 'Kitchen Dweller' hovering near the snacks and the dog
The 'Shadow' following the host around until they find a safe group
The 'Ghost' who makes a polite appearance and leaves after 45 minutes

round1.text: What is {name}'s digital communication style?
options: The 'Instant Responder' who replies before you've even finished typing
The 'Novelist' who sends five consecutive paragraphs
The 'Time Traveler' who replies three business days later with 'lol true'
The 'Voice Noter' who refuses to use their thumbs

round1.text: It's a rainy Saturday afternoon. Where is {name}?
options: Deep-cleaning the entire house while listening to a podcast
Horizontal on the couch in a 'doom-scrolling' trance
Halfway through a hobby they started yesterday and will quit tomorrow
Aggressively napping to make up for a chaotic week

round1.text: What is {name}'s go-to move when they're genuinely annoyed?
options: Total radio silence and a very visible 'fine' face
A calculated, sarcastic remark that cuts deep
Venting to anyone who will listen for exactly twenty minutes
Cleaning or organizing things aggressively to blow off steam

round2.text: What would {name} regret most not doing?

What would {name} do with a surprise week off work?
What hill would {name} die on?
What's {name}'s biggest ick?

round2.text: What keeps {name} up at night?
What would {name} spend a windfall of money on first?
If {name} had to give up one forever?
If {name} found a wallet with � and no ID, what would they actually do?
options: Keep it—it's a gift from the universe
Hand it into the nearest shop, even if they think the staff will keep it
Spend it immediately on a round of drinks for everyone
Leave it exactly where it is to avoid the moral karma

round2.text: What does {name} value most in a long-term friendship?
options: Brutal honesty, even when it's uncomfortable
Consistency and showing up for the boring stuff
Shared humor and the ability to laugh at anything
Loyalty—knowing they have a 'ride or die' in their corner

round2.text: How does {name} handle a major life disagreement with a friend?
options: Initiates a 'sit down' talk to process every emotion
Wait for it to blow over and act like nothing happened
Writes a long, carefully worded text to avoid immediate confrontation
Distances themselves until they aren't angry anymore

round2.text: What is {name}'s internal 'success' metric?
options: Professional status and the respect of their peers
Financial freedom and the ability to buy whatever they want
The quality and depth of their personal relationships
Personal growth and feeling like a 'better' version of themselves

round2.text: In a hypothetical 'zombie apocalypse' group, what is {name}'s role?
options: The Leader: Making the hard calls and keeping order
The Specialist: Fixing things and being useful
The Morale Booster: Cracking jokes so no one loses it
The Realist: Pointing out why every plan will probably fail

round3.text: What does {name} secretly judge people for?
What's {name}'s biggest insecurity they rarely talk about?
How would {name} react to a major life disappointment?
options: Talk it out with someone close
Pretend they're fine until they are

round3.text: What's {name} most afraid of about the future?
What does {name} wish people understood about them?
options: They care more than they show
They're not as confident as they seem

round3.text: If {name} could change one thing about themselves?
options: Care less about what others think

round3.text: What makes {name} cry (even if they won't admit it)?
What's the compliment {name} secretly wants to hear most?
What would {name} never forgive in a friendship?

options: That they aren't living up to their full potential
That they are secretly annoying to the people they love

round3.text: Which of these is {name} most likely to hide from the world?
options: How much they actually care about what strangers think
A deep-seated fear of being alone or forgotten
A sensitive side that contradicts their 'tough' exterior

round3.text: When {name} is feeling overwhelmed, what do they need most but rarely ask for?
options: Someone to take the lead and make decisions for them
Genuine validation that they are doing a good job
Physical space and total silence without judgment
A distraction that makes them forget their responsibilities

round3.text: What is the fastest way to hurt {name}'s feelings, even if they don't show it?
options: Dismissing an idea they were genuinely excited about
Being 'left out' of a plan or an inner-circle joke
Receiving constructive criticism when they didn't ask for it

round3.text: If {name} were to be totally honest, what is their 'emotional default'?
options: Restless—always looking for the next thing
Content—trying to maintain the current peace
Guarded—waiting to see how others react first

round1.text: What side of the bed does {name} prefer?
What does {name} do when they want your attention?

round1.text: How does {name} show love without saying it?
What's {name}'s most annoying relationship habit?

round1.text: What does {name} look like when they're hangry?
What would {name} want for breakfast in bed?
options: Just coffee, don't talk to me

round1.text: What does {name} hog most?
What's {name}'s texting style when you're apart?

Starting the dishwasher but never actually emptying it

round1.text: What is {name}'s ideal 'lazy' date night?
options: Ordering the exact same takeout as last time and a movie
Parallel play: both on phones/laptops but touching feet
A long drive with a specific playlist and no destination
Deep-diving into a niche YouTube documentary together

round1.text: How does {name} usually announce they are hungry?
options: A subtle, polite 'What are you thinking for dinner?'
Getting increasingly cranky (hangry) until you notice
The 'I'll eat anything' lie (they will reject the first 3 options)
Sending a link to a menu or a food photo with no context

round1.text: What is {name}'s 'social battery' limit when you're out together?
options: The 'Early Bird': Ready to go as soon as the main event ends
The 'Vibe Checker': Stays as long as the music/energy is good
The 'Marathoner': Always the last to leave
The 'Look': They give you a specific facial expression that means 'leave now'

round1.text: What is {name}'s most specific domestic quirk?
options: A very particular way the bed must be made
An irrational hatred of a specific chore (e.g., the bins)
Needing to 'decompress' in total silence for 20 minutes after work
A bizarrely organized ritual for their morning routine

round2.text: What does {name} need most after a hard day?
What's {name}'s love language?
What would {name} sacrifice last?
Where does {name} see you both in 5 years?
What topic does {name} avoid talking about?
What does {name} think makes a relationship last?
What's {name}'s way of apologising after a fight?
options: Cracking a joke to break the ice

round2.text: What's the one thing {name} wishes you did more of?
How does {name} handle jealousy?
What would upset {name} most in a relationship?
Which 'Love Language' does {name} actually value most in a partner?
options: Acts of Service: Doing the thing they didn't want to do
Words of Affirmation: Specific, unprompted compliments
Quality Time: Phones away, focused attention
Physical Touch: Constant, low-key physical proximity

round2.text: How does {name} handle a heated argument?
options: The Lawyer: Debating points with logic and facts
The Exploder: Everything comes out at once, then they're fine
The Turtle: Needs to retreat and process before speaking
The Peacemaker: Tries to fix it or apologize immediately to end the tension

round2.text: What is {name}'s biggest 'green flag' in a relationship?
options: Being able to sit in comfortable silence together
Matching their level of ambition and drive
A sense of humor that perfectly mirrors their own

round2.text: What does {name} find most difficult to share with you?
options: When they are feeling inadequate or 'not enough'
When they are annoyed by something small you did

round2.text: If you both had a completely free day, what would {name} want to prioritize?
options: Productivity: Ticking off life goals or errands together
Rest: Deep recovery and zero responsibilities
Adventure: Going somewhere new or doing an activity
Connection: Focused time to talk and reconnect

round3.text: What does {name} secretly worry about in this relationship?
What's the hardest thing for {name} to say to you?
What does {name} value most about you?
options: How safe you make them feel

round3.text: What's {name}'s biggest relationship fear?
What would {name} change about how you argue?
options: Resolve faster, don't let it simmer

round3.text: What makes {name} feel most loved by you?
options: When you remember the little things
When you choose them over other plans
When you just sit with them in silence

round3.text: What has {name} learned about themselves from being with you?
options: That they're more patient than they thought
That they deserve to be loved well

round3.text: What moment in your relationship does {name} replay the most?
options: An inside joke that always lands
A time you showed up when it mattered

round3.text: If {name} could relive one day with you, what kind of day?
options: An ordinary day that just felt perfect

round3.text: What does {name} need to hear from you right now but hasn't asked for?
options: 'You don't have to be strong all the time'

round3.text: What is {name}'s deepest 'relationship fear'?
options: Becoming 'boring' or stagnant as a couple
Losing their individual identity within the partnership
Waking up one day and realizing the spark is gone
Being a burden to you during hard times

round3.text: What is something {name} often needs from you but struggles to voice?
options: To be told they are attractive/desired without asking
To be given more 'mental load' support without prompting
To be checked in on when they seem 'fine'
To have their boundaries respected without having to defend them

round3.text: How has {name}'s view of love changed since being with you?
options: It feels more like a choice/commitment than just a feeling
They feel safer to be 'messy' and imperfect
They've realized they don't have to do everything alone
They've learned that conflict doesn't always lead to ending

round3.text: What part of {name}'s personality do they feel you 'get' better than anyone else?
options: Their weird sense of humor that others find confusing
Their underlying anxiety that they mask with confidence
The way they show love through small, invisible actions

round3.text: If {name} could change one 'dynamic' in the relationship, what would it be?
options: Finding a better balance of household/life responsibilities
Deepening the emotional intimacy even further

round1.text: What's {name}'s go-to sleeping position?
options: Clinging onto you like a koala

round1.text: What does {name} do right before falling asleep?

round1.text: What is {name}'s favorite way to wake you up?
options: Bringing you a hot drink as a peace offering

Opening the curtains and being suspiciously productive

options: Arctic Tundra: Fans on, window open, heavy duvet

round2.text: What's {name}'s biggest turn-on that isn't physical?

options: A spontaneous getaway with no plan

options: Good but could use more adventure

round3.text: What's the thing {name} finds unexpectedly attractive about you?

round3.text: How adventurous does {name} actually want to be?

round3.text: What would {name} never admit they enjoy?

round3.text: If you could read {name}'s mind in bed, what would shock you most?
options: How much they think about you during the day

round3.text: If {name} were to be 'adventurous', what direction would they head in?

round3.text: What is {name}'s secret bedroom 'superpower'?
options: Being incredibly intuitive about what you need
Their ability to switch from 'sweet' to 'spicy' instantly

Making even the simplest moments feel high-stakes

round3.text: What is something {name} finds 'secretly' attractive but hasn't fully admitted?
options: When you are being bossy or in charge
When you are being particularly vulnerable or 'soft'

When you are deeply focused on a task or hobby

round3.text: Which of these is the 'ultimate' intimate experience for {name}?
options: A long, slow burn that builds over an entire evening
A deep, emotional connection where it feels like 'one'

round3.text: What does {name} want more of, but feels 'too shy' to ask for?
options: More verbal feedback and 'talk' during the act
More focus on their specific desires and fantasies
